final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing 3×3 grid poster layout for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) health and wellness content.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu editorial poster, clean minimalist design, light skeuomorphic illustration style, magazine-quality layout
Composition: 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), clear grid boundaries with visible spacing between cells, each cell centered and self-contained, generous whitespace, large readable Chinese typography
Subject: sleep wellness tips for women, cozy bedtime elements (soft bed, moon, pillow, sleep mask, curtains, hot milk, aromatherapy, books, stars)
Scene/backdrop: cream white and oatmeal beige background, warm muted palette
Lighting/mood: soft warm ambient, healing and calming atmosphere
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel, small accents of dark brown text, gentle and soothing tones
Materials/textures: soft fabric textures, paper-like matte finish, light 3D illustrated elements
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: 9 separate cells that can be cropped into individual posts, all text in Chinese only, no English, no text near grid lines, each cell works as standalone Xiaohongshu card, unified visual style across all cells, professional social media design aesthetic, no cheap marketing look
Avoid: cluttered layout, small text, garbled characters, excessive decoration, cheap marketing vibe, text overlapping grid boundaries
